product_overview: A localized Next.js site that presents gym training programs and trainers with a consistent site shell (Navbar/Footer) and support for English and Arabic locales.
core_goals: Provide a stable, localized public site shell (layout, navigation, footer) for English and Arabic audiences.
Expose data-driven pages for training programs and trainers that are easy to browse and maintain.
Gracefully handle unsupported locales and data-source failures with clear UX and redirects.
Make endpoint surface simple and predictable to support static/dynamic rendering in Next.js.

features.name: Core Site Shell
features.description: Main layout and navigation (Navbar, Footer) that wraps localized content and serves as the entry point for each locale.
user_flows: GET /en -> Receive 200 with HTML layout including Navbar and Footer and English localized content
GET /ar -> Receive 200 with HTML layout including Navbar and Footer and Arabic localized content (dir=rtl)
GET /fr -> Receive 302 redirect to /en -> GET /en -> Receive 200 with HTML layout and localized content

features.name: Training Programs & Trainers
features.description: Public, data-driven pages that list training programs and trainers; sources include lib/data/programs.male.ts and lib/data/trainers.male.ts.
user_flows: GET /en/programs -> Receive 200 with list of programs (HTML/JSON) populated from programs data
GET /en/programs -> Receive 500 if data source read fails -> Show 500/error page to the user
GET /en/trainers -> Receive 200 with trainers directory populated from trainers data
GET /ar/trainers -> Receive 200 with trainers directory localized to Arabic
GET /xx/trainers -> Receive 302 redirect to /en/trainers -> GET /en/trainers -> Receive 200 with trainers directory

features.name: Localization System
features.description: Routing and middleware that support Arabic and English locales, ensuring pages render with the correct language and direction.
user_flows: GET /ar -> Receive 200 with Arabic content and page direction set to rtl
GET /en -> Receive 200 with English content and page direction set to ltr
GET /de -> Receive 302 redirect to /en -> GET /en -> Receive 200 with English content

features.name: Core Site Shell
features.description: Main layout and navigation components with localization support.

features.name: Training Programs & Trainers
features.description: Data-driven menus for gym offerings and coaching staff.
